caption: A woman with curly black hair tied in a high bun is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone on a stand. She wears a dark green t-shirt with a circular graphic and text that includes "TALK 101." Behind her is a black backdrop with white and red text that reads "BESS TALK 101," "It's A Unique Hustle," "CAST," and "About It!" A framed picture of a man is visible on the wall to her left. In the lower-left corner, a logo says "BESS TALK 101" and "GEB." Throughout the sequence, the woman maintains a slight smile and looks towards someone off-screen, gesturing slightly with her hand. The scene remains static in terms of location and equipment, with only subtle changes in her facial expression and posture as she continues to speak.
